tenant_id.description: ID of the company/tenant this schedule belongs to

user_id.description: MongoDB _id of the employee this schedule applies to

user_email.description: Email of the employee (for quick lookup)

working_days.description: Array of day-of-week numbers (0=Sun, 1=Mon, ..., 6=Sat). E.g., [1,2,3,4,5,6] = Mon-Sat

work_hours_per_day.description: Standard working hours per day for this employee

shift_start.description: Optional shift start time in HH:mm format (e.g., '09:00')

shift_end.description: Optional shift end time in HH:mm format (e.g., '18:00')

effective_from.description: Date from which this schedule is effective

notes.description: Optional admin notes about this schedule

updated_by.description: Email of the admin who last updated this schedule
